propositions: Integrate task-decomposition SOTA recommendations R1-R7 into the plan-review gate, each validated by its own falsifiable eval gate before implementation and deferred with recorded results if the gate fails.
Validation is eval-based only (experiments E1/E2/E3/E5/E6, with E4 A/B dropped per operator directive) and post-ship validation is dogfooding via R7 instrumentation rather than A/B testing.
Validated changes land directly in the packaged review registry/rubrics with no config-flag or overlay gating, and new criteria may enter at advisory posture first.
R7 dogfood monitoring demotes a criterion's posture to advisory when its trailing blocking-FP proxy exceeds a 10% threshold.

E1 was closed but rescoped: it delivered a valid event-mined outcome corpus and unlabeled finding sample, but its finding-level TP/FP adjudication corpus and kappa>=0.7 gate were invalidated as tool-less/plan-truncated and contaminated, then descoped.

The remaining E-experiments and R-implementations are unrun and deferred as resourcing-dependent work, and an adjudicator must be at least as capable as the gate it judges to avoid circular ground truth.
